title: EN 1993-1-3 Purlin Capacity Design
description: Design steel purlins in accordance with EN 1993-1-3:2006.

areaCustom.description: Area (A). Units: mm2. Area of purlin section.

moixCustom.description: Ix. Units: mm4. Moment of inertia about major axis.

moiyCustom.description: Iy. Units: mm4. Moment of inertia about minor axis.

zxCustom.description: Zx. Units: mm3. Elastic section modulus about major axis.

zyCustom.description: Zy. Units: mm3. Elastic section Mmodulus about minor axis.

d.description: Depth (d). Units: mm. Depth of the section.

b.description: Flange (b). Units: mm. Width of the section.

l.description: Lips (l). Units: mm. Length of the lip.

t.description: Thickness (t). Units: mm. Thickness of the section.

custom.description: Custom Properties. Symbol: Custom_{box}. Toggle to input custom section properties.

Fy.description: Yield Strength (fyb). Units: MPa. Yield strength of steel.

E.description: Modulus of Elasticity (E). Units: MPa. Modulus of elasticity of steel.

W.description: Density (W). Units: kg/m^3. Mass density of steel.

deflection.description: Allowable Deflection (L/n). Note: n = Deflection Limit.

L.description: Bay Length (L). Units: m. Distance between supports.

s.description: Spacing (s). Units: m. Center-to-center spacing of purlins.

a.description: Roof Slope (θ). Roof slope in degrees.

G.description: Dead Load (G). Units: kPa. Area load.

Ql.description: Live Load (Ql). Units: kPa. Area load.

Qwi.description: Inward Wind Load (Qw+). Symbol: Qw_{+}. Units: kPa. Area load.

Qwo.description: Outward Wind Load (Qw-). Symbol: Qw_{-}. Units: kPa. Area load (negative value represents suction).

Qs.description: Snow Load (Qs). Units: kPa. Area load.

γ_Gj.description: Partial factor for Permanent Action (γGj). Symbol: γ_{Gj}. EN 1990 Table A1.2(A) (Partial factor for Permanent Action Value - EQU).

Ψ_0.description: Factor for Combination Value (Ψ0). EN 1990 Table A1.1 (Factor for Combination Value).

Ψ_1.description: Factor for Frequent Value (Ψ1). EN 1990 Table A1.1 (Factor for Frequent Value).

Ψ_2.description: Factor for Quasi-Permanent Value (Ψ2). EN 1990 Table A1.1 (Factor for Quasi-Permanent Value).

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
